allow: Bash(node -e "const { truncateSourceCode } = require\('./utils'\); console.log\('=== Test 1: Short string ==='\); console.log\(truncateSourceCode\('hello world'\)\); console.log\('=== Test 2: Null ==='\); console.log\(truncateSourceCode\(null\)\); console.log\('=== Test 3: Over 200 lines ==='\); const longLines = Array\(250\).fill\('line'\).join\('\\n'\); const result = truncateSourceCode\(longLines\); console.log\('Lines in result:', result.split\('\\n'\).length\); console.log\('Ends with marker:', result.endsWith\('// ... [truncated]'\)\); console.log\('=== Test 4: Over 10K chars ==='\); const longChars = 'x'.repeat\(15000\); const result2 = truncateSourceCode\(longChars\); console.log\('Chars in result:', result2.length\); console.log\('Ends with marker:', result2.endsWith\('// ... [truncated]'\)\);")

Bash(node --check main.js 2>&1 && echo "main.js: OK"
node --check typescript/file-tree-mapper-typescript.js 2>&1 && echo "ts-mapper: OK"
node --check nodejs/file-tree-mapper-nodejs.js 2>&1 && echo "nodejs-mapper: OK"
node --check python/file-tree-mapper-python.js 2>&1 && echo "python-mapper: OK"
node --check golang/file-tree-mapper-golang.js 2>&1 && echo "golang-mapper: OK"
node --check java/file-tree-main-java.js 2>&1 && echo "java-mapper: OK"
node --check csharp/file-tree-mapper-csharp.js 2>&1 && echo "csharp-mapper: OK"
node --check salesforce/file-tree-mapper-salesforce.js 2>&1 && echo "sf-mapper: OK"
node --check php/file-tree-mapper-php.js 2>&1 && echo "php-mapper: OK"
node --check vbnet/file-tree-mapper-vbnet.js 2>&1 && echo "vbnet-mapper: OK")
Bash(ls test/ 2>/dev/null && cat test/*.js 2>/dev/null | head -30 || echo "No test files found")

Bash(grep -n "fs.readFileSync.*utf8" typescript/extract-*.js nodejs/extract-*.js python/extract-*.js java/extract-*.js csharp/extract-*.js golang/extract-*.js salesforce/extract-*.js php/extract-*.js vbnet/extract-*.js 2>/dev/null)
